title: hemionitis glanduloviscida
intro: Hemionitis glanduloviscida, also known as the viscid fern or glandular fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hemionitis glanduloviscida include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. Hemionitis glanduloviscida is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can be used in herbal remedies in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
